params.pdb_content:
REMARK Minimal alanine test
ATOM      1  N   ALA A   1       0.000   0.000   0.000  1.00  0.00           N
ATOM      2  CA  ALA A   1       1.458   0.000   0.000  1.00  0.00           C
ATOM      3  C   ALA A   1       2.009   1.420   0.000  1.00  0.00           C
ATOM      4  O   ALA A   1       1.246   2.390   0.000  1.00  0.00           O
END
params.psf_content:
PSF

       1 !NTITLE
 REMARKS minimal psf for testing

       4 !NATOM
       1 PROT 1    ALA  N    NH1   -0.470000       14.0070           0
       2 PROT 1    ALA  CA   CT1    0.070000       12.0110           0
       3 PROT 1    ALA  C    C      0.510000       12.0110           0
       4 PROT 1    ALA  O    O     -0.510000       15.9990           0

       3 !NBOND: bonds
       1       2       2       3       3       4

       0 !NTHETA: angles

       0 !NPHI: dihedrals

       0 !NIMPHI: impropers

       0 !NDON: donors

       0 !NACC: acceptors

       0 !NNB: nonbonded exclusions
       0       0       0       0
params.namd_conf:
# NAMD Configuration
structure input.psf
coordinates input.pdb
paraTypeCharmm on
parameters par_minimal.prm
temperature 300
outputName output
numsteps 100
timestep 1.0
DCDfreq 10
outputEnergies 10
exclude scaled1-4
1-4scaling 1.0
switching on
switchDist 10
cutoff 12
pairlistdist 14
cellBasisVector1 30.0 0.0 0.0
cellBasisVector2 0.0 30.0 0.0
cellBasisVector3 0.0 0.0 30.0
cellOrigin 1.0 1.0 0.0

parameter_files.par_minimal.prm:
* Minimal CHARMM parameters for alanine backbone
*

ATOMS
MASS  1  NH1   14.0070
MASS  2  CT1   12.0110
MASS  3  C     12.0110
MASS  4  O     15.9990

BONDS
NH1  CT1   320.0   1.458
CT1  C     250.0   1.522
C    O     620.0   1.230

ANGLES
NH1  CT1  C     50.0  109.5
CT1  C    O     80.0  120.0

DIHEDRALS

IMPROPER

NONBONDED nbxmod 5 atom cdiel shift vatom vdistance vswitch -
cutnb 14.0 ctofnb 12.0 ctonnb 10.0 eps 1.0 e14fac 1.0 wmin 1.5

NH1    0.0  -0.2000  1.8500
CT1    0.0  -0.0200  2.2750  0.0  -0.0100  1.9000
C      0.0  -0.1100  2.0000
O      0.0  -0.1200  1.7000  0.0  -0.1200  1.4000

END
